title: Flaxen Flair
description: A floral and fluffy one-pot Tunisian dish featuring flaxseed, fermented for a unique taste profile that's both diabetic-friendly and suitable for those with special dietary needs.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic to the pot, sauté until translucent.
Stir in tomato paste, salt, pepper, and optionally, fermented ingredients (if using).
Chop squash into small cubes and add them to the pot with 1 cup of chicken or vegetable broth.
Cover and simmer for about 20 minutes until the squash is tender.
Blend half of the squash mixture in a blender or food processor until smooth, then mix it back into the pot.
Add flaxseeds to the pot and stir well. Cook for an additional 5-10 minutes until heated through.
Stir in fresh herbs just before serving.
